content: /feature-dev add a tool that reads an invoice by id

Generated MCP tool:
  name: read_invoice
  description: fetch a single invoice document by id
  allowed-tools: [Read]
  scopes: [read]
  input:
    invoice_id: string
  oauth_scopes: ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly"]
Scoped to read-only against the invoices folder; no write or delete capability.
